name: Exide 610C EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop systems. Cars with slightly higher-than-average electrical demands. Vehicles frequently used in moderate traffic conditions.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 610C EFB car battery is a powerful and reliable choice for vehicles with basic start-stop systems. With 35Ah capacity and 280 CCA, it delivers consistent starting power, maintenance-free convenience, and spill-resistant EFB technology for everyday driving.

name: Exide 611C EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop functionality. Cars with slightly higher-than-average electrical demands. Vehicles frequently used in moderate traffic conditions.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 611C EFB car battery offers dependable performance for entry-level start-stop vehicles. Its 35Ah capacity, 280 CCA rating, and compact 241 x 173 x 215mm footprint make it a practical upgrade for cars with moderate electrical demands.

name: Exide 612CE EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop systems. Cars with moderate electrical demands (basic sound systems, etc.). Vehicles frequently driven in urban or stop-and-go traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 612CE EFB car battery is a maintenance-free 12V solution with 44Ah capacity and 345 CCA. Built for basic start-stop applications, it combines spill-resistant design with improved cycling performance over standard flooded batteries.

name: Exide 615C EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop systems. Cars with slightly higher electrical usage. Vehicles commonly driven in moderate traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 615C EFB car battery delivers compact power for smaller battery trays. With 38Ah capacity, 270 CCA, and a 187 x 127 x 224mm case, it suits vehicles with basic start-stop systems and moderate electrical loads.

name: Exide 616C EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles equipped with basic start-stop systems. Cars with slightly elevated electrical demands (i.e., basic sound systems). Vehicles frequently used in moderate urban or stop-and-go traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 616C EFB car battery is designed for entry-level start-stop vehicles with modest electrical needs. It offers 38Ah capacity, 270 CCA, maintenance-free operation, and durable EFB performance in urban stop-and-go conditions.

name: Exide 616CS EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop functionality. Cars with slightly elevated electrical needs (modest sound systems etc.). Vehicles operated mainly in urban areas with stop-and-go traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 616CS EFB car battery provides enhanced performance for compact start-stop applications. With 38Ah capacity, 270 CCA, and a wider 136mm case width, it is suited to vehicles needing reliable EFB durability and reserve capacity.

name: Exide 621C EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop systems. Cars with moderate electrical demands (sound systems, navigation, etc.). Vehicles often driven in stop-and-go traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 621C EFB car battery is built for vehicles with moderate electrical demands and basic start-stop functionality. It offers 52Ah capacity, 400 CCA, and dependable EFB cycling performance for daily commuting.

name: Exide 622C EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop systems. Cars with moderate electrical demands (audio systems, navigation, etc.). Vehicles used extensively in urban environments or stop-and-go traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 622C EFB car battery combines 52Ah capacity with 400 CCA for cars that need stronger reserve power and start-stop support. Its 241 x 173 x 215mm dimensions suit a wide range of passenger vehicles.

name: Exide 626CE EFB Car Battery
popularFits: Vehicles with basic start-stop systems. Cars with moderate electrical demands (audio, navigation, etc.). Vehicles frequently driven in stop-and-go traffic.
seoDescription: The Exide Gold Range 626CE EFB car battery delivers high cranking performance with 53Ah capacity and 424 CCA. It is maintenance-free, spill-resistant, and built for reliable starts in demanding heat and cold.
